name: 电影胶片
css: background: #1a1a1a; border: 3px solid #333; border-radius: 2px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 8px 8px 40px 8px; background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 18px, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 18px, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 20px); background-size: 100% 100%;
